sentiment: The tools we build quietly begin building themselves, asking us to do less so we can become more.

stories.title: Shadcn/UI now defaults to Base UI instead of Radix
stories.summary: A popular UI component library shifts its foundation overnight — the ground beneath our interfaces is never as solid as we think.

stories.title: sqlite-utils 4.0rc2, mostly written by Claude Fable (for about $149.25)
stories.summary: A mature Python library's next major version was mostly written by an AI agent — the cost of labor is becoming the cost of compute.

stories.title: Pandoc Lua Filters
stories.summary: Embedding a scripting language inside a document converter — the quiet power of tools that let you reshape their own behavior.
